info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

tags.name: YouTube
tags.description: Scrape YouTube channels, videos, and more

get.description: Get transcript of a video or short

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: 2 letter language code, ie 'en', 'es', 'fr' etc. If the transcript is not available in the language you specify, the transcript will be null.

example.transcript_only_text: welcome back to the hell farm and the backyard trails we built these jumps two years ago and last year we just kind of rebuilt them and this year......
